debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i ≠ j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

failed_attempts:
classical
  by_cases hij : i < j
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n hij
  · have hji : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt hij) (Ne.symm h)
    have hsymm : (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) = (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) j i) := by
      funext ω
      simpa using (wignerMatrixSymmetric (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n j i (ω := ω)).symm
    simpa [hsymm] using (offDiagonalHasLaw' (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n (i := j) (j := i) hji)

by_cases hij : i < j
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n hij
  · have hji : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt hij) (Ne.symm h)
    have hlaw : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) j i) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) :=
      offDiagonalHasLaw' (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n hji
    simpa [wignerMatrixSymmetric (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n i j] using hlaw
